content: Just as high school language arts leverages written reflexion as a structured metacognitive tool to help students correct their own reasoning gaps, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow the scaffolded writing workshop framework to turn unstructured self-critique into graded, iterative reflection cycles that improve output reliability. This approach reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI technical trick, but as a scaled version of a proven educational pedagogy that has refined human metacognition for decades.
